name: The Cash Exchange Auto Pawn
description_short: The Cash Exchange is a collateral-based lender offering 90-day pawn loans at 3% monthly interest on valuables, vehicles, jewelry, and merchandise without credit checks.
description_long:
The Cash Exchange operates two locations in Clinton Township, Michigan (one main pawnbroker location on Gratiot Avenue and one auto pawn specialty location on Groesbeck Highway). Founded as a collateral lending business, the company has built its reputation by loaning cash based on the value of items pledged rather than borrower creditworthiness. The business was voted Macomb County's Best Place to Sell Gold in 2025 by Macomb Daily readers.

The company offers 90-day collateral loans at state-mandated rates (3% monthly interest plus 2% insurance and $3 storage fees). They accept a wide range of items including vehicles (cars, trucks, motorcycles, RVs, ATVs, boats), jewelry, firearms, tools, electronics, and general merchandise. Vehicle storage is tiered: $100/month inside, $50/month outside, $40/month for motorcycles. They also operate Venus Jewelers, a full-service jewelry retailer inside the Gratiot location offering below-wholesale pricing, custom designs, repairs, and ring sizing. Additional services include buying/selling merchandise, lay-away programs (excluding firearms), and gold purchasing.

The Cash Exchange distinguishes itself through state-mandated rate lending, professional licensed and bonded staff, state-of-the-art security and vault protection, loan renewal flexibility (extend for another 90 days without repayment schedules), and the integrated Venus Jewelers boutique. Customer reviews highlight fair pricing, quick service, and friendly staff. The company positions itself as Detroit's premier collateral lender with a transparent fee structure and no credit evaluation requirement.

As a traditional pawn operation, The Cash Exchange serves consumers needing quick cash against valuables but charges compounding monthly fees that can exceed typical personal loan rates if loans are renewed multiple times. The 3% monthly rate (36% APR) is competitive for pawn shops but higher than payday alternatives or personal loans. Borrowers should understand that unredeemed items are sold by the shop, and the loan terms favor short-term cash needs rather than long-term financing.
pros: State-mandated interest rates (3% monthly) with transparent fee disclosure upfront
No credit check required; loans based entirely on collateral value
Fast cash disbursement in minutes with no application or waiting period
Flexible renewal option: extend 90-day loans for another 90 days without mandatory repayment schedules
Specialized auto pawn facility with tiered vehicle storage options ($40-$100/month)
Integrated Venus Jewelers offers below-wholesale jewelry, custom design, and repair services on-site
All employees licensed, bonded, and insured with state-of-the-art security and vault protection
Voted Best Place to Sell Gold in Macomb County (2025) with established market reputation
cons: 3% monthly interest (36% APR) compounds quickly if loans are renewed; a $1,000 loan renewed 3 times costs $360+ in interest alone
Additional mandatory fees stack on top of interest: 2% insurance per month plus $3-$100 storage fees, significantly increasing true cost of borrowing
Unredeemed items are sold by the shop; borrowers lose collateral permanently if unable to repay within 90 days or after renewals
Vehicle storage fees ($50-$100/month) make auto pawns expensive for longer-term financing, incentivizing quick redemption
No mention of payment plan flexibility or hardship options; rigid 90-day renewal cycle may not suit all financial situations
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history needing emergency cash against personal valuables
Vehicle owners needing short-term collateral loans for quick cash within 90 days
Jewelry buyers seeking below-wholesale prices and custom jewelry services
Individuals selling gold, precious metals, or high-value items for immediate cash
diagnosis: The Cash Exchange is best suited for borrowers needing immediate cash ($500-$5,000+) and possessing collateral of value—jewelry, vehicles, or other items—who lack traditional credit access or need faster service than banks provide. The primary caveat is that 3% monthly interest plus stacked fees (insurance, storage) creates a true cost of 40-50%+ APR when all charges compound, making this suitable only for short-term emergency needs, not extended financing; borrowers should strongly prioritize redemption within 90 days to avoid compounding renewal costs.
services: 90-day collateral loans at 3% monthly interest on valuables, jewelry, and merchandise
Auto pawn loans for cars, trucks, motorcycles, RVs, ATVs, and boats with monthly storage fees
Gold buying and selling (voted Best Place to Sell Gold in Macomb County)
Jewelry retail and sales at below-wholesale prices via Venus Jewelers
Custom jewelry design, repairs, and ring sizing (full-time jeweler on staff)
Buy and sell general merchandise (electronics, hunting gear, tools, firearms, bullion, diamonds)
Loan renewal option for another 90 days at end of term
Lay-away programs for jewelry, general merchandise, and automobiles
Secure storage with state-of-the-art vault protection and insurance
Firearms sales (licensed dealer, all federal and state regulations complied)
Inside and outside vehicle storage options
